assumptions.text: Apple's mitigation strategies (geographic diversification, multi-sourcing, dual-supplier programs) are sufficient to absorb the disclosed political/trade/disaster risks without material disruption to product availability or margins.
Apple's R&D investment cadence and integrated hardware-software stack will continue to deliver differentiated products at a rate that sustains premium pricing against fast-following competitors.
Apple's premium positioning and high-income customer base insulate revenue against macroeconomic downturns to a degree that limits material risk to financial results.
